meaning: adv.到那边,向那方adj.在那边的,对岸的,那边的
examples: They all immediately felt a wish to go thither; all except three.
They have dragged themselves thither for shelter.
Refugees run hither and thither in search of safety.
Hence, the man to whom it had belonged had come thither and had died there.
EU. And an apparently insouciant Mr Zoellick has been jetting around the world signing bilateral deals hither and thither.
